headline: 暑期档新片预热，痴迷领跑榜单
headlineEn: Summer Film Season Heats Up, 'Obsession' Leads Charts
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度不减，多部大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' remain hot this week, with several big films on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周持续上榜
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' continues trending this week

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》定档消息成焦点
《奥德赛》与《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Odyssey' and 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' highly anticipated
